artifacts: Universal2 .dmg — ONE file containing BOTH Intel and Apple Silicon builds of everything (a literal 'fat binary'). The user never needs to know which chip they have.

python_extra.note: native mouse prong (no cliclick needed); freeze wheels for BOTH arches into the bundled python. Absent on stock OC5 today — bundling turns this dormant prong on.

cliclick.role: keyboard + mouse; bundle a universal build

osascript.role: AppleScript keystroke fallback — shipped with every Mac ever made; why a stock Mac can type with zero installs

first_run_consent: Accessibility (control this computer) — System Settings prompt, once
Screen Recording — System Settings prompt, once
signing: Developer ID signing + notarization are MANDATORY or Gatekeeper blocks first run with a scary dialog. GRANT ACTION: Apple Developer Program enrollment ($99/yr).
